subject: Fermi GBM trigger 486562774/160602514 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 486562774/160602514
at 12:19:30.71 UT on 2 June 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact 
not due to a GRB. This trigger is probably due to an burst from SGR 1935+2154."
